subcodes.title: Words spoken in Dec. 1900
subcodes.first_line: Husseyn, son of Fatima, is expected with twelve Imams. Moses is expected by the Jews to return as the Messiah.
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @station of the Manifestation of God, @Adam; Adam and Eve, @reincarnation, @oneness or innumerability of the Manifestations of God, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity
